title: Powr Visuals - GUI
description: Powr Visuals - GUI seeks to create a graphical user interface that feels new and clean, ultimately making Minecraft more visually appealing.

AI generated Icon

**This is the GUI only Version.**

Full Pack: [Powr Visuals](https://modrinth.com/project/powr-visuals)

# Powr Visuals: Simple Elegance, Animated Detail

Experience Minecraft with a fresh perspective through **Powr Visuals**. This resource pack carefully balances simplicity and visual enhancement, offering a cohesive black, grey, and white theme that provides a clean and updated look without losing the familiar essence of vanilla Minecraft.

## Key Features:

* **Clean & Modern Aesthetic:** Immerse yourself in a striking black, grey, and white color palette for a refined visual experience.
* **Vanilla Inspired:** Powr Visuals thoughtfully orients itself around Minecraft's original textures, ensuring a familiar yet revitalized feel.
* **Subtle Animations:** Discover a new layer of dynamism with carefully integrated animations that bring various in-game elements to life.
* **Enhanced Clarity:** Enjoy a visually cleaner interface and world, allowing key details to stand out.

**Powr Visuals** aims to provide a subtle yet impactful visual upgrade for your Minecraft world. Enjoy the simplicity and the added touch of animation!

## Supported Mods (1.5 and above):
- **AppleSkin** by squeek502
- **Enchanting Infuser** by Fuzs
- **Iris Shaders** by coderbot
- **Mod Menu** by Terraformers
- **Shulkerbox Tooltip** by MisterPeModder
- **Trade Cycling** by henkelmax
- **Travelers Backpack** by Tiviacz1337
- **Trinkets** by Emi
- **Xaeros Minimap** by thexaero
- **Xaeros Worldmap** by thexaero

## Credits:
**Vanilla Tweaks** for the Item Stiching Fix, Unique Dyes, Lower Shield and Lower Fire:
[Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/)

## Additional Information:
All Versions that are listed below have been removed or not uploaded due to rendering and loading issues caused by some corrupted files.
- 0.2 - 0.5
- 0.7 - 1.2
- 1.3
- 1.4
  
I advise you to keep this resource pack updated at all times to avoid loading issues.

Thanks for viewing/downloading :)
